power_enables.name: PPVAON_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: 3V8 AON VR enable — gates the main PP3V8_AON rail from U5700
power_enables.source: MPMU/SMC (via delay circuit D5340/R5340/R5341 on page 30)

power_enables.name: PPV5S2TS_PWR_EN
power_enables.description: 5V S2 VR enable — gates PP5V_S2 from UC260 (TPS62130)

power_enables.name: CHGR_AUX_OK
power_enables.description: Charger AUX OK — indicates charger is ready. Pull-up circuit on page 30.

power_good_fault.name: PPVAON_FAULT_L
power_good_fault.description: 3V8 AON fault indicator — FAULT_PULL_0MR_DSVR_COMP (configured on page 34)

power_good_fault.name: PMU_FAULT_OUT_L
power_good_fault.description: PMU fault output — indicates PMU error condition

power_good_fault.name: PMU_ACTIVE_READY
power_good_fault.description: PMU active ready — indicates PMU has completed startup. Aliased to PMU_ACTIVE_READY on page 48.

power_good_fault.name: PMU_SOP10_READY_REG
power_good_fault.description: SPMU S0P10 domain ready signal. Via SPMU UGPIO2_LVAWEN_L on page 39.

power_good_fault.name: PMU_SYS_ALIVE
power_good_fault.description: PMU system alive indicator. Level shifted via UP750 on page 46.

resets.name: PMU_RESET_L
resets.description: PMU reset line — master reset for MPMU. Aliased on page 48.

resets.name: SOC_FORCE_DFU
resets.description: Force DFU mode — puts SoC into Device Firmware Update mode. Aliased on page 48.

resets.name: CHGR_RST_2N
resets.description: Charger reset signal from U8740 charger reset circuit. Now takes 1.2V per PMU.

resets.name: ATCRTMR_RESET
resets.description: ATC re-timer reset — via UF700 level shifter. Sequenced with power-up.

resets.name: PMU_RSLOC_RST_L
resets.description: PMU RSLOC reset. Aliased to PMU_RSLOC_RST_1 on page 48.

i2c_buses.name: AP_I2C0
i2c_buses.description: AP I2C bus 0 — UPC 0, UPC 1, UPC 5, ALL_CALL devices

i2c_buses.name: AP_I2C1
i2c_buses.description: AP I2C bus 1 — SPKAMP TAWAS A/B, CODEC CAPLOW

i2c_buses.name: AP_I2C2
i2c_buses.description: AP I2C bus 2 — ATCRTMR I2C (AT13 S, AT13 I devices)

i2c_buses.name: AOP_I2C0
i2c_buses.description: AOP I2C bus 0 — ALS, ALS TEMP SENSOR

i2c_buses.name: ISP_I2C0
i2c_buses.description: ISP I2C bus 0 — CAMERA MISC PANEL, CAMERA SENSOR PANEL

i2c_buses.name: SMC_I2C3
i2c_buses.description: SMC I2C bus 3 — PALM_REXT_TEMP (CD300), with level shifter UG300

i2c_buses.name: SMC_I2C4
i2c_buses.description: SMC I2C bus 4 — SEV ADC 1, SEV ADC 2 (CD310/CD311)

spi_buses.name: SPI_UPC0
spi_buses.description: SPI to UF400 (CD3217 ATC0) firmware ROM

spi_buses.name: SPI_UPC1
spi_buses.description: SPI to UF500 (CD3217 ATC1) firmware ROM

spi_buses.name: SPI_UPC5
spi_buses.description: SPI to UPC5 (MagSafe CD3217) firmware ROM

clock_signals.name: PMU_32K_CLK_HDSC
clock_signals.description: 32.768kHz clock from MPMU XO. 32K XO (portables) on page 44.

sensor_adc.name: PPBUS_VSENSE (VP0R)
sensor_adc.description: PPBUS voltage sensor — PBUS Voltage Sense on page 57

sensor_adc.name: MAIN_PMU_HIGH_SIDE (IPMR)
sensor_adc.description: Main PMU (MPMU) high-side current sense — PP3V8_AON_MPMU_1SNS

sensor_adc.name: SECONDARY_PMU_HIGH_SIDE (IPSR)
sensor_adc.description: Secondary PMU (SPMU) high-side current sense — PP3V8_AON_SPMU_1SNS

pro_specific_sensors.name: ATC_VR_HIGH_SIDE (IULR)
pro_specific_sensors.description: ATC VR high-side current sense — PP3V8_AON_ATC_1SNS

pro_specific_sensors.name: SD_HIGH_SIDE (ISDR)
pro_specific_sensors.description: SD card high-side current sense — PP3V3_S2M_SNS
